title: pedilonum infractum
intro: Pedilonum infractum, also known as the broken pedilonum or pedilonum, is a plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of pedilonum infractum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
